name: Hometown Golf and Social
about: Hometown Golf & Social is a family-friendly indoor golf and sports club located in Glens Falls, NY. The facility features state-of-the-art simulators with multisport capabilities, offering games like golf, football, baseball, and hockey in a casual, welcoming environment. Memberships are available with varying benefits including simulator time, off-hours access, and coaching packages. The venue combines entertainment with dining, featuring a menu of pizzas, shareable apps, and local drinks designed for all ages and occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Multisport simulator games extend beyond traditional golf for diverse entertainment
Family-friendly environment with flexible hours for day or night visits
On-site PSG Golf provides professional instruction and coaching packages

food_and_drink.notes: Menu includes pizzas, shareable apps, seasonal bites, and casual food options for all ages
Full bar with rotating drink list featuring local flavors and classic cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue welcomes players to bring their own clubs, though club rentals are available for those without equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own menu of local favorites and signature cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole sessions vary depending on simulator usage and group size, but average around 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Hometown Golf & Social is designed as a family-friendly environment with activities and menu options suitable for all ages.
